funds.legal_name: KraneShares Mount Lucas Managed Futures Index Strategy ETF
iMGP DBi Managed Futures Strategy ETF

locator.fund_section: KMLM fund summary and KFA MLM Index description

sources.title: KraneShares Trust Statement of Additional Information
KraneShares Trust definitive materials filing metadata

preservation.limitation: SEC metadata was verified at its stable EDGAR locator; automated byte preservation was rate-limited during admission.

sources.title: iMGP DBi Managed Futures Strategy ETF Prospectus
iMGP Funds Statement of Additional Information

preservation.limitation: Verified at stable EDGAR locator; no local byte capture used for decision support.

evidence.evidence_summary: The prospectus identifies the underlying index methodology as trend following across commodities, currencies, and global fixed income.
The disclosed futures universe spans commodities, currencies, and global fixed income, satisfying the governed multi-asset threshold.
The fund discloses futures implementation and use of a wholly owned Cayman subsidiary for commodity futures exposure.
The SAI corroborates the wholly owned subsidiary structure and its commodity and financial derivatives mandate.
The index description states that trading signals determine long or short positions in eligible futures markets.

location.section: KMLM Principal Investment Strategies and KFA MLM Index description

evidence.evidence_summary: The reviewed disclosure states daily signal evaluation and monthly rebalancing but does not disclose a signal lookback horizon; those frequencies are not treated as the horizon.

history.note: Admitted as bounded evidence of non-disclosure, not as evidence of a horizon value.

evidence.evidence_summary: The prospectus describes a managed-futures strategy that seeks to replicate the pre-fee performance of a representative basket of leading managed-futures hedge funds using factor analysis.
The prospectus explicitly identifies DBMF as an actively managed ETF.
The disclosed derivative universe spans equities, fixed income, currencies, and commodities.
The fund uses long and short derivatives, primarily futures and forward contracts, and routes commodity exposure through a wholly owned subsidiary.
The SAI corroborates the controlled subsidiary and aggregate derivatives structure.
The reviewed prospectus describes representative-basket replication but does not state that DBMF tracks the SG CTA Index or any named index.
The prospectus explicitly permits both long and short derivative positions.

decisions.reasoning_summary: The verified prospectus explicitly identifies a trend-following methodology; ECS-SF-R01 maps that disclosure to the controlled result.
limitations: Classification is structural and makes no performance claim.
Solo-operator review; no independent second reviewer.

decisions.reasoning_summary: The verified prospectus names three governed asset families, satisfying ECS-MB-R02.
limitations: Market breadth is based on the disclosed eligible universe, not a point-in-time holdings inference.
Solo-operator review; no independent second reviewer.

decisions.reasoning_summary: The prospectus and SAI jointly establish futures implementation by the fund and a wholly owned commodity subsidiary.
limitations: This result describes the disclosed route and not every permitted derivative.
Solo-operator review; no independent second reviewer.

decisions.reasoning_summary: The index description explicitly permits signals to establish long or short futures positions, satisfying ECS-DF-R01.
limitations: Directional flexibility does not describe current positioning.
Solo-operator review; no independent second reviewer.

decisions.reasoning_summary: Daily evaluation and monthly rebalancing are disclosed, but the signal lookback horizon is not; ECS-SH-R00 preserves that distinction as an explicit unknown.
limitations: The result is a bounded non-disclosure finding, not a claim that no horizon exists.
No standalone official index methodology document was located during this admission.
Solo-operator review; no independent second reviewer.

decisions.reasoning_summary: The primary document supports replication of a representative managed-futures basket; it does not support an index-tracking claim.
limitations: No claim that DBMF tracks the SG CTA Index.
Structural classification only; no performance or relative-quality claim.
Solo-operator review; no independent second reviewer.

decisions.reasoning_summary: The prospectus directly identifies the fund as actively managed.
limitations: Structural classification only; no performance or relative-quality claim.
Solo-operator review; no independent second reviewer.

decisions.reasoning_summary: Four governed asset families satisfy the multi-asset rule.
limitations: Structural classification only; no performance or relative-quality claim.
Solo-operator review; no independent second reviewer.

decisions.reasoning_summary: Prospectus and SAI support futures and forwards with commodity exposure through a controlled subsidiary.
limitations: Swaps are not represented as the governing route.
Structural classification only; no performance or relative-quality claim.
Solo-operator review; no independent second reviewer.

decisions.reasoning_summary: The admission confirms that index-tracking status is not determinable from the reviewed primary disclosure.
limitations: Confirmed describes the evidence conclusion, not a known benchmark relationship.
Structural classification only; no performance or relative-quality claim.
Solo-operator review; no independent second reviewer.

decisions.reasoning_summary: The primary disclosure explicitly supports long and short derivative positions.
limitations: Structural classification only; no performance or relative-quality claim.
Solo-operator review; no independent second reviewer.
